sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14392" key="*)aprago/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀπρᾱγόπολις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14392.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Castle of Indolence, Sans-souci,</tr_> as Augustus called his retreat on an island near Capri, <bibl n="urn:cts:latinLit:phi1348.phi012:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suet.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Aug.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
